channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New York Knicks reach NBA Finals for first time since 1999 after sweep
item.description: The Knicks defeated the Cavaliers to complete a sweep of the Eastern Conference finals.

item.title: Three dead after Belgian train collides with school minibus
item.description: A train crashed into a school minibus in Buggenhout, Belgium, killing several people, including two teenagers.

item.title: North Korea launches ballistic missiles toward sea in latest display
item.description: South Korea reports that North Korea fired multiple short-range ballistic missiles toward the sea.

item.title: North Korea fires ballistic missile and other weapons toward sea, South says
item.description: North Korea launched multiple short-range ballistic missiles toward the sea, according to South Korea's military, continuing a series of weapons tests.
